lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. It requires significant mechanical repairs and has extensive exterior and interior damage. Several electrical systems are currently non-functional.
Good condition.
The car is in poor condition. There is significant cosmetic damage to both the exterior and interior. Multiple mechanical systems require immediate repair or replacement to be fully operational.

Get ready to own a vehicle that is in truly pristine, showroom condition! This car has been exceptionally well-maintained and looks just as incredible as the day it was first driven. From its flawless exterior to its spotless, like-new interior, every detail reflects the highest level of care. It’s a rare find that offers a perfect driving experience for its next lucky owner!

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, essentially indistinguishable from a brand-new car on a showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless, with a deep, mirror-like finish and no chips, scratches, or imperfections of any kind. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the leather seats show no signs of wear, and all electronics and features function perfectly. Mechanically, it is in top-tier shape, having been meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that has been preserved in such exceptional, like-new condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver, though it shows its age in several areas. The exterior has some noticeable paint fading on the hood and roof, along with a few minor door dings and a small scuff on the rear bumper. Inside, the upholstery is intact but shows typical wear, and the driver's seat has a small tear in the side bolster. Mechanically, the car starts and runs well, but it will likely need new tires and a brake service in the near future. All electronics and the air conditioning are currently functioning. This is a solid option for someone looking for a functional vehicle who doesn't mind some cosmetic imperfections.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and reliability. Featuring a clean profile and a well-preserved interior, this unit has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity. This represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a dependable, high-caliber driving experience.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my reliable ride, and it’s honestly in such great shape! It’s been well-loved, runs like a dream, and is totally ready for its next adventure. If you're looking for a solid, dependable car that’s been taken care of, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Offering a mechanically sound E92 M3 featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8. This unit delivers a linear power band peaking at its 8,400 RPM redline, mated to a crisp 6-speed manual transmission for maximum driver engagement. The chassis maintains its composure through Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and an M Variable Differential Lock, ensuring optimal lateral acceleration and exit traction. Recent service includes preventative rod bearing replacement and updated throttle actuators, addressing key S65 maintenance items. The vehicle exhibits minor cosmetic patina consistent with its mileage, but the subframe is solid, and the VANOS system remains quiet. A turn-key performance machine for the enthusiast who prioritizes drivetrain integrity and tactile feedback.
Used car. Good condition. Runs well. Clean interior. Minimal exterior wear. Title in hand.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a refined driving experience and timeless style. The exterior features a deep, lustrous finish that has been regularly waxed, though it shows a few minor stone chips on the front fascia and a small superficial scuff on the rear bumper consistent with careful highway use. Inside, the leather interior remains supple and clean, preserved by a smoke-free and pet-free environment. Representing a superior value proposition within its class, the automobile features a well-preserved interior and robust mechanical integrity. It serves as an exemplary choice for the discerning driver seeking a dependable, high-caliber experience that has been vetted for long-term consistency.

Hey there! I'm super excited to find a new owner for my awesome car! It's in really solid shape and has been so reliable for me. It’s perfect for someone looking for a smooth, dependable ride that’s been well-cared for. I’ve loved driving it, and I know you will too! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions or want to come see it in person!

This E46 M3 features the iconic S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, renowned for its 8,000 RPM redline and individual throttle body induction. Power is managed via a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a limited-slip differential, providing exceptional mechanical grip and tactile feedback. The chassis boasts a balanced 50/50 weight distribution, complemented by a reinforced rear subframe to mitigate common floor-pan fatigue. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS system refresh and shim-and-bucket valve adjustment, optimizing the variable valve timing for peak volumetric efficiency. While showing minor aesthetic patina consistent with its mileage, the mechanical synchronization and throttle response remain sharp, offering a pure analog driving experience
Used car. Good condition. Regularly maintained. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, mirror-like finish, showing only minor signs of road use consistent with a well-loved car. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary; the premium leather seats are supple with minimal creasing, and every electronic feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system—functions flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs quiet and strong, backed by a comprehensive service history and recent fluid changes. Equipped with a set of high-tread tires and responsive brakes, this car is turn-key ready for its next owner. It has been smoke-free and garage-kept, ensuring it stays in impressive shape for years to come.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been maintained to an exacting standard. Everything runs smoothly, and I’ve kept up with the maintenance so she’s ready to hit the road today. Come take her for a spin—you're going to love how she handles!

This E46 M3 is powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and a 7,900 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M differential lock for optimal power distribution. This example boasts documented subframe reinforcement and a recent VANOS system service, addressing critical preventative maintenance. The suspension retains its factory geometry with refreshed bushings, ensuring the sharp turn-in and chassis balance the platform is known for. While displaying minor cosmetic wear consistent with enthusiast use, the mechanical integrity remains high, offering a visceral, analog driving experience with linear power delivery and exceptional throttle response.
Used car in good condition. Runs well. Clean title. Maintenance current. No issues.

Mechanically, this car is in top form; it has followed a strict maintenance schedule, ensuring the engine is responsive and the transmission shifts seamlessly. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the brakes provide confident stopping power. This is a reliable, turn-key vehicle that has been treated with respect and is ready for many more miles of dependable service.

The exterior features a brilliant metallic finish that still catches the sunlight beautifully, with only minor, expected signs of road use that do not detract from its impressive curb appeal. All electronic features, including the premium sound system and climate control, function exactly as they should. Mechanically, this car is in strong health; it has been serviced at regular intervals, with a documented history of oil changes and routine inspections. The engine runs smoothly, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the tires have significant tread remaining. This is a reliable, turn-key vehicle that has been treated with genuine care and is ready for its next owner. It represents an outstanding value for someone seeking a high-quality pre-owned car that performs beautifully on the road.
